manual_review_reason: The paper's central empirical claim (beta orthogonal to AR(1), r~0, p>0.05) is not reproduced in this run (r=-0.395, p=3.4e-11) on synthetic-fallback data. Root cause is very likely the synthetic data generator entangling beta and AR(1) by shared construction, not an implementation defect -- but this must be confirmed against real NASA AIRS data before drawing conclusions about the paper's empirical validity.
